narrative: RBNZ hawkishness and Fed leadership transition drive G8 price action — NZD/USD bids to 0.5880 as RBNZ holds 2.25% with a hiking bias, while Fed Chair Warsh's swearing-in statement reprices USD expectations. NZD/USD 150bp carry favors USD, but RBNZ's hawkish stance and a -0.83% real rate keep the kiwi firm; gold lower -0.53%; equities +0.61%; DXY -0.07%; VIX 16.9. Watch RBNZ policy implementation and US GDP data for the next directional catalyst.
